observations.base_adequacy: Independent pairwise BGE-base QC does not reliably beat BM25.
observations.overall: Supervised FULL-true improves over its own null condition.
observations.repeat: Response direction and utility are reliably positive and explain the overall gain.
observations.strict_nonrepeat: Response is nearly universal, but direction is near chance and utility is not reliable.
observations.repeated_query_strict_nonrepeat: The exploratory intersection has an adverse point pattern; it is not independent confirmation.
observations.wrong_user: True-over-wrong is positive overall, but most donors are global fallbacks rather than exact-query matches.

required_next_evidence: multiple seeds and later independent datasets
